ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., D1, D2) */,
  "outlook" TEXT /* Outlook (e.g., Sunny, Overcast, Rain) */,
  "temp" TEXT /* Temperature (e.g., Hot, Mild, Cool) */,
  "humidity" TEXT /* Humidity (e.g., High, Normal) */,
  "wind" TEXT /* Wind speed (e.g., Weak, Strong) */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Amount of precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "pressure" TEXT /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outdoor_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outdoor activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the outdoor activity (e.g., playing sports, walking) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outdoor activity */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of the activity */,
  "recommended_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions recommended for the activity */,
  "recommended_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature range recommended for the activity */,
  "recommended_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity range recommended for the activity */,
  "recommended_wind" TEXT /* Wind speed range recommended for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather record for the day */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outdoor activity */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of people using the park or facility */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the park where the activity took place */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific facility within the park */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_usage_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_park_usage_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES outdoor_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, citizen) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizen_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the report */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather record for the day */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the outdoor activity */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the park where the report was made */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific facility within the park */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user making the report */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the park or activity (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_reports_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_reports_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES outdoor_activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citizen_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, report submission) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_text" TEXT /* Text of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
